recommendations.title: We're So Young
recommendations.overview: The life of Renato Russo, from his first involvement with music, to his years in the punk rock band Aborto Alétrico, to the formation of Legião Urbana, in the Brasília rock scene of 1970s and 1980s.

recommendations.title: 18 Years Old and Rising
recommendations.overview: Primo is an ordinary middle-class youngster studying for his baccalaureate, who gets side-tracked when he falls in love with a rich girl. They soon learn they have to deal with her condescending friends who look down upon this upstart.

recommendations.title: From Me to You
recommendations.overview: Sawako Kuronuma looks miserable on the outside, but is actually a positive-minded girl, who looks up to Shota Kazehaya, a sociable and friendly boy. Perceiving Sawako's good intentions, he secretly has feelings for her. Sawako meets Kazehaya and make

recommendations.title: Given
recommendations.overview: Haruki secretly had feelings for Akihiko for years, but Akihiko was still in a relationship with his roommate, the violinist Ugetsu Murata. Haruki, Akihiko, and Ugetsu's love clashes and starts to move forward.

recommendations.title: Bang Gang (A Modern Love Story)
recommendations.overview: Biarritz. Sixteen-year-old George, the high school hottie, falls in love with Alex. To get his attention, she initiates a group game with Alex, Nikita, Laetitia and Gabriel. They will discover, test, and push the limits of their sexuality.

recommendations.title: The Kissing Booth
recommendations.overview: When teenager Elle's first kiss leads to a forbidden romance with the hottest boy in high school, she risks her relationship with her best friend.

recommendations.title: The Wizards Return: Alex vs. Alex
recommendations.overview: While trying to prove to her family she can be mature and responsible, teen wizard Alex Russo conjures up a spell to rid herself of her bad qualities, unintentionally creating a Good and Evil Alex. When Evil Alex gets involved in a plan to take over

recommendations.title: Camp Rock
recommendations.genres: Music, Comedy, Drama, Romance, Family, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: When Mitchie gets a chance to attend Camp Rock, her life takes an unpredictable twist, and she learns just how important it is to be true to yourself.

recommendations.title: Rock 'n' Roll High School
recommendations.overview: A group of rock-music-loving students, with the help of the Ramones, take over their school to combat its newly installed oppressive administration.

recommendations.title: Write It on the Walls
recommendations.overview: Sole, a university student bored of her daily routine, meets graffiti artists Pierpaolo and Alex, and her life changes until she falls in love with one of them.
